Records.description: Prescriptive-unitarity kissing-box integral for two-loop six-gluon planar massless QCD amplitudes, constructed as two one-loop boxes joined at a single cubic vertex, with a numerator of the form $n_{kb}=[[m,b,c,j]][[k,f,g,l]]$ (Eq. (eq:Ikb)). It provides the two-loop leading singularity prefactor $R_{kb}$ for the IR-finite part of the hard function. Called $I_{n,jklm}^{kb}$ in the paper (with $n=6$ the number of legs). Eight massless propagators (two boxes, one shared vertex), six massless external gluons, all distinct helicity sectors --++++, -+-+++, -++-++ computed through weight four via IBP reduction to the Henn:2025xrc planar two-loop six-point UT basis with FIRE7, KIRA3 and FiniteFlow. Contributes only to pure-YM ($N_f^0$) hard functions.
Records.location: Section 5, Eq. (eq:Ikb); Fig. fig:six-points; IBP reduction in Appendix sec: IBP reduction
